BlobStorage._Comment: Provider selection: 'Local' for filesystem, 'Azure' for Azure Blob Storage. Override in production with 'Azure'.

LocalFileBlobStorage._Comment: Local filesystem blob storage (used when Provider = 'Local')

AzureBlobStorage._Comment: Azure Blob Storage configuration (used when Provider = 'Azure'). Set connection string via environment variable or Azure Key Vault in production.

DurableTask._Comment: DurableTask orchestration backend: 'FileSystem' for dev, 'AzureStorage' for cloud

AzureStorage._Comment: Azure Storage backend for orchestration state. Supports both connection string and Managed Identity authentication.

Tenants._Comment_Mode: Controls multi-tenancy behavior. 'Isolated' = multiple customers with separate data stores (SaaS). 'Distributed' = single customer with horizontal sharding (NOT YET IMPLEMENTED - Phase 20.2+)
Tenants._Comment_Configurations: Array of tenant configurations. TenantId 0 is RESERVED for system operations (transaction IDs). Regular tenants start at TenantId 1+

Configurations._Comment: System Partition - Reserved for transaction IDs

TransactionWatcher._Comment: Automatically commits stalled transactions. Scans all active tenants periodically.
